requirement_topic.en: INMETRO Compulsory Certification — Power Adapters and Battery Chargers
requirement_topic.zh: INMETRO强制认证——电源适配器和电池充电器
requirement_topic.zht: INMETRO強制認證——電源適配器和電池充電器

summary.en: Power adapters, AC/DC converters, and battery chargers bundled with or sold alongside wireless and IoT devices in Brazil are subject to INMETRO compulsory certification. INMETRO (Instituto Nacional de Metrologia, Qualidade e Tecnologia) administers Brazil's compulsory product certification system. Products in scope must be certified by an INMETRO-accredited certification body before import or sale, tested to applicable ABNT NBR IEC safety standards (including ABNT NBR IEC 62368-1 for audio/video, information, and communication technology equipment). The certified product must carry the INMETRO mark. Applicable Portarias (ministerial orders) define the precise scope, test standards, and certification scheme for each product category.
summary.zh: 与巴西无线/物联网设备捆绑销售或配套销售的电源适配器、交流/直流转换器和电池充电器，须取得INMETRO强制认证。INMETRO（巴西国家计量、质量和技术研究院）负责管理巴西强制产品认证体系。范围内产品在进口或销售前须经INMETRO认可的认证机构认证，并依据适用ABNT NBR IEC安全标准（包括音视频、信息及通信技术设备的ABNT NBR IEC 62368-1）进行检测。经认证产品须加贴INMETRO标志。适用Portarias（部令）界定各产品类别的精确范围、检测标准和认证方案。
summary.zht: 與巴西無線/物聯網裝置捆綁銷售或配套銷售的電源適配器、交流/直流轉換器和電池充電器，須取得INMETRO強制認證。INMETRO（巴西國家計量、質量和技術研究院）負責管理巴西強制產品認證體系。範圍內產品在進口或銷售前須經INMETRO認可的認證機構認證，並依據適用ABNT NBR IEC安全標準（包括音視頻、信息及通訊技術設備的ABNT NBR IEC 62368-1）進行檢測。經認證產品須加貼INMETRO標誌。適用Portarias（部令）界定各產品類別的精確範圍、檢測標準和認證方案。

standards_or_laws: INMETRO Portaria — compulsory certification requirements for power adapters and chargers (specific Portaria number subject to INMETRO current schedule)
ABNT NBR IEC 62368-1 — safety standard for audio/video, information and communication technology equipment
Lei 9.933/1999 — enabling legislation for INMETRO compulsory certification system

summary.en: In China, power adapters and chargers for electronic products are typically subject to CCC (China Compulsory Certification) under the China Compulsory Certification system administered by CNCA and tested to GB 4943.1 or GB/T 42799 (IEC 62368-1 equivalent) safety standards. CCC certificates are issued by CNCA-designated bodies. Chinese safety certification is based on GB national standards and Chinese voltage/frequency norms (220 V / 50 Hz, consistent with Brazil). CCC approval is not recognised by INMETRO and does not substitute for Brazilian compulsory certification.
summary.zh: 在中国，电子产品的电源适配器和充电器通常须依据CNCA（中国国家认证认可监督管理委员会）管理的中国强制认证（CCC）体系取得CCC认证，并按GB 4943.1或GB/T 42799（IEC 62368-1等效标准）安全标准进行检测。CCC证书由CNCA指定机构颁发。中国安全认证基于GB国家标准和中国电压/频率规范（220 V/50 Hz，与巴西一致）。CCC核准不被INMETRO承认，不能替代巴西强制认证。
summary.zht: 在中國，電子產品的電源適配器和充電器通常須依據CNCA（中國國家認證認可監督管理委員會）管理的中國強制認證（CCC）體系取得CCC認證，並按GB 4943.1或GB/T 42799（IEC 62368-1等效標準）安全標準進行檢測。CCC證書由CNCA指定機構頒發。中國安全認證基於GB國家標準和中國電壓/頻率規範（220 V/50 Hz，與巴西一致）。CCC核准不被INMETRO承認，不能替代巴西強制認證。

standards_or_laws: CCC (China Compulsory Certification) — mandatory pre-market safety certification for power adapters and chargers in China
GB 4943.1 — safety standard for IT equipment in China
GB/T 42799 — China national standard equivalent to IEC 62368-1
CNCA — China National Certification and Accreditation Administration, scheme administrator

gap.en: Chinese CCC certification for power adapters and chargers is not recognised by INMETRO and does not satisfy Brazilian compulsory certification requirements. A separate INMETRO compulsory certification is required for in-scope power supply products before import or sale in Brazil. The applicable INMETRO Portaria must be confirmed for the specific product type, and testing must be carried out by an INMETRO-accredited laboratory to ABNT NBR IEC standards. The INMETRO mark must appear on the certified product.
gap.zh: 中国针对电源适配器和充电器的CCC认证不被INMETRO承认，不满足巴西强制认证要求。范围内电源产品在巴西进口或销售前，须另行取得INMETRO强制认证。须确认适用于特定产品类型的INMETRO Portaria，并由INMETRO认可实验室依据ABNT NBR IEC标准进行检测。经认证产品须加贴INMETRO标志。
gap.zht: 中國針對電源適配器和充電器的CCC認證不被INMETRO承認，不滿足巴西強制認證要求。範圍內電源產品在巴西進口或銷售前，須另行取得INMETRO強制認證。須確認適用於特定產品類型的INMETRO Portaria，並由INMETRO認可實驗室依據ABNT NBR IEC標準進行檢測。經認證產品須加貼INMETRO標誌。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — INMETRO compulsory certification required for in-scope power adapters and chargers before import or sale in Brazil
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory — CCC certification required for in-scope power adapters and chargers before sale in China

source.publisher: INMETRO — Instituto Nacional de Metrologia, Qualidade e Tecnologia (Brazil)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Brazil requires INMETRO compulsory certification for power adapters and battery chargers. Chinese CCC certificates are not recognised. The applicable INMETRO Portaria and certification scheme must be confirmed for the specific product type, and testing must be performed by an INMETRO-accredited body to ABNT NBR IEC standards. Verify current INMETRO scope with a qualified Brazilian regulatory professional.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 巴西要求电源适配器和电池充电器取得INMETRO强制认证。中国CCC证书不被承认。须确认特定产品类型适用的INMETRO Portaria和认证方案，并由INMETRO认可机构按ABNT NBR IEC标准进行检测。请向合格的巴西监管专业人士核验现行INMETRO范围。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 巴西要求電源適配器和電池充電器取得INMETRO強制認證。中國CCC證書不被承認。須確認特定產品類型適用的INMETRO Portaria和認證方案，並由INMETRO認可機構按ABNT NBR IEC標準進行檢測。請向合格的巴西監管專業人士核驗現行INMETRO範圍。

requirement_topic.en: INMETRO Compulsory Certification — IT and Telecommunications Terminal Equipment (Electrical Safety)
requirement_topic.zh: INMETRO强制认证——信息技术及电信终端设备（电气安全）
requirement_topic.zht: INMETRO強制認證——信息技術及電信終端設備（電氣安全）

summary.en: In addition to power adapters, certain wireless and IoT devices that are also in-scope electrical or electronic products under INMETRO's compulsory certification schedule may require INMETRO certification for the device itself. INMETRO Portarias define product categories subject to compulsory certification, which have expanded over time to include categories such as information technology and telecommunications equipment, consumer electronics, and household electrical appliances. For products that fall within a compulsory certification category, an INMETRO-accredited certification body must certify the product to applicable ABNT NBR IEC standards before import or sale. Manufacturers should confirm the current INMETRO compulsory certification schedule (lista de produtos) to determine whether their specific wireless or IoT device is in scope.
summary.zh: 除电源适配器外，属于INMETRO强制认证范围内的电气或电子产品的某些无线/物联网设备，可能还需要针对设备本身取得INMETRO认证。INMETRO Portarias界定须强制认证的产品类别，该类别随时间推移不断扩展，已涵盖信息技术及电信设备、消费电子产品和家用电气设备等类别。对于属于强制认证类别的产品，INMETRO认可的认证机构须在进口或销售前按适用ABNT NBR IEC标准对产品进行认证。制造商应确认最新INMETRO强制认证产品目录（lista de produtos），以确定其具体无线/物联网设备是否在适用范围内。
summary.zht: 除電源適配器外，屬於INMETRO強制認證範圍內的電氣或電子產品的某些無線/物聯網裝置，可能還需要針對裝置本身取得INMETRO認證。INMETRO Portarias界定須強制認證的產品類別，該類別隨時間推移不斷擴展，已涵蓋信息技術及電信設備、消費電子產品和家用電氣設備等類別。對於屬於強制認證類別的產品，INMETRO認可的認證機構須在進口或銷售前按適用ABNT NBR IEC標準對產品進行認證。製造商應確認最新INMETRO強制認證產品目錄（lista de produtos），以確定其具體無線/物聯網裝置是否在適用範圍內。

standards_or_laws: INMETRO Portarias — compulsory certification requirements for information technology and telecommunications equipment categories
ABNT NBR IEC 62368-1 — safety requirements for audio/video, information and communication technology equipment
ABNT NBR IEC 60950-1 — predecessor IT equipment safety standard (products certified under this standard should verify transition to 62368-1)
Lei 9.933/1999 — enabling legislation for INMETRO compulsory certification

summary.en: In China, information technology and telecommunications terminal products are subject to CCC (China Compulsory Certification) administered by CNCA. Relevant product categories for Wi-Fi routers, IoT hubs, and similar devices include audio and video apparatus, information technology equipment, and telecommunications terminal equipment. Testing is conducted to GB 4943.1 (or the newer GB/T 42799 based on IEC 62368-1) and related GB EMC standards. Chinese domestic voltage is 220 V / 50 Hz, which aligns with Brazil, but certification schemes and recognised bodies differ entirely between the two countries.
summary.zh: 在中国，信息技术和电信终端产品须依据CNCA管理的中国强制认证（CCC）体系认证。Wi-Fi路由器、物联网集线器及类似设备的相关产品类别包括音视频设备、信息技术设备和电信终端设备。检测依据GB 4943.1（或基于IEC 62368-1的较新标准GB/T 42799）及相关GB EMC标准进行。中国国内电压为220 V/50 Hz，与巴西一致，但两国的认证方案和认可机构完全不同。
summary.zht: 在中國，信息技術和電信終端產品須依據CNCA管理的中國強制認證（CCC）體系認證。Wi-Fi路由器、物聯網集線器及類似設備的相關產品類別包括音視頻設備、信息技術設備和電信終端設備。檢測依據GB 4943.1（或基於IEC 62368-1的較新標準GB/T 42799）及相關GB EMC標準進行。中國國內電壓為220 V/50 Hz，與巴西一致，但兩國的認證方案和認可機構完全不同。

standards_or_laws: CCC (China Compulsory Certification) — mandatory for IT, AV, and telecommunications terminal equipment in China
GB 4943.1 / GB/T 42799 — China safety standards for IT and communications equipment
CNCA — China National Certification and Accreditation Administration, scheme administrator

gap.en: CCC certification for IT and telecommunications products is not recognised by INMETRO. Manufacturers must check the current INMETRO lista de produtos to confirm whether the specific wireless or IoT device category is subject to INMETRO compulsory certification. If in scope, a Brazil INMETRO compulsory certification from an accredited body is required before import or sale. Test reports from Chinese laboratories not accredited by INMETRO are not directly accepted.
gap.zh: 针对IT和电信产品的CCC认证不被INMETRO承认。制造商须核查最新INMETRO产品目录（lista de produtos），以确认具体无线/物联网设备类别是否须取得INMETRO强制认证。如在适用范围内，须在进口或销售前取得认可机构颁发的巴西INMETRO强制认证。未经INMETRO认可的中国实验室出具的检测报告不被直接接受。
gap.zht: 針對IT和電信產品的CCC認證不被INMETRO承認。製造商須核查最新INMETRO產品目錄（lista de produtos），以確認具體無線/物聯網裝置類別是否須取得INMETRO強制認證。如在適用範圍內，須在進口或銷售前取得認可機構頒發的巴西INMETRO強制認證。未經INMETRO認可的中國實驗室出具的檢測報告不被直接接受。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory if product category is listed in INMETRO compulsory certification schedule — verify scope against current INMETRO lista de produtos
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory — CCC certification required for in-scope IT, AV, and telecommunications terminal equipment before sale in China

source.publisher: INMETRO — Instituto Nacional de Metrologia, Qualidade e Tecnologia (Brazil)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Brazil INMETRO compulsory certification may apply to the wireless or IoT device itself (not only the power adapter) depending on the product category. CCC certification is not recognised. Manufacturers must verify whether the specific product type appears on the current INMETRO lista de produtos and, if so, obtain INMETRO compulsory certification from an accredited body before import or sale in Brazil.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 巴西INMETRO强制认证可能适用于无线/物联网设备本身（不仅限于电源适配器），具体取决于产品类别。CCC认证不被承认。制造商须核验具体产品类型是否列于最新INMETRO产品目录（lista de produtos），如已列入，须在进口或于巴西销售前取得经认可机构颁发的INMETRO强制认证。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 巴西INMETRO強制認證可能適用於無線/物聯網裝置本身（不僅限於電源適配器），具體取決於產品類別。CCC認證不被承認。製造商須核驗具體產品類型是否列於最新INMETRO產品目錄（lista de produtos），如已列入，須在進口或於巴西銷售前取得經認可機構頒發的INMETRO強制認證。
